mission.title: Install and Configure Tikv on Kubernetes
mission.description: TiKV is an open-source, distributed, and transactional key-value database that provides ACID-compliant transactional APIs. Installing TiKV allows you to leverage its powerful features for managing large-scale data with high consistency and horizontal scalability.

steps.title: Clone the TiDB Operator repository
steps.description:
TiKV is deployed on Kubernetes via the TiDB Operator. Clone the operator repo:
```bash
git clone https://github.com/pingcap/tidb-operator.git
cd tidb-operator
```

steps.title: Install TiDB Operator CRDs
steps.description:
Install the Custom Resource Definitions:
```bash
kubectl create -f manifests/crd.yaml
```

steps.title: Install TiDB Operator via local Helm chart
steps.description:
Install the operator from the local chart:
```bash
kubectl create namespace tidb-admin
helm install tidb-operator charts/tidb-operator --namespace tidb-admin --version v1.6.1
```

steps.title: Deploy a TiKV cluster
steps.description:
Create a TiKV cluster using the TidbCluster CR:
```bash
kubectl create namespace tikv
kubectl apply -n tikv -f - << 'EOF'
apiVersion: pingcap.com/v1alpha1
kind: TidbCluster
metadata:
  name: basic
spec:
  version: v8.5.0
  timezone: UTC
  pvReclaimPolicy: Retain
  pd:
    replicas: 1
    requests:
      storage: "1Gi"
  tikv:
    replicas: 3
    requests:
      storage: "10Gi"
EOF
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n tikv
kubectl get tidbcluster -n tikv
```

resolution.summary: TiKV is deployed on Kubernetes via the TiDB Operator with PD and TiKV components running.

uninstall.title: Remove the TiKV cluster
uninstall.description:
```bash
kubectl delete tidbcluster basic -n tikv
kubectl delete namespace tikv
```

uninstall.title: Uninstall TiDB Operator
uninstall.description:
```bash
helm uninstall tidb-operator -n tidb-admin
kubectl delete -f manifests/crd.yaml
kubectl delete namespace tidb-admin
```

upgrade.title: Pull latest and upgrade operator
upgrade.description:
```bash
cd tidb-operator && git pull
helm upgrade tidb-operator charts/tidb-operator --namespace tidb-admin
```

upgrade.title: Upgrade TiKV cluster version
upgrade.description:
```bash
kubectl patch tidbcluster basic -n tikv --type merge -p '{"spec":{"version":"v8.5.0"}}'
```

troubleshooting.title: TiKV pods stuck in Pending
troubleshooting.description:
TiKV requires persistent storage. Ensure a StorageClass is available:
```bash
kubectl get storageclass
kubectl describe pod -n tikv | grep -A5 Events
```

troubleshooting.title: PD not starting
troubleshooting.description:
PD (Placement Driver) must start before TiKV. Check PD logs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/component=pd -n tikv
```

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have a Kubernetes cluster running and have installed Helm and kubectl on your local machine.
